---
name: "💡 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea or a technical improvement for kumir3-core
title: "[FEATURE] <short_description>"
labels: [enhancement, discussion]
---

## 📝 Summary

A clear and concise description of the proposed feature. What is the "elevator pitch" for this change?

## 🎯 Motivation

Why is this feature important?

- What problem does it solve?
- Is there a specific use case in the Kumir language that is currently difficult or impossible to implement?

## 🛠 Proposed Solution

Describe your vision for the implementation.

- **API/Syntax changes:** How will this look in the code?
- **Logic:** How should the core engine handle this?
- **Backward Compatibility:** Will this break existing `.kum` programs?
- **Test Plan:** How can we verify this feature works as intended?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why is the proposed solution the best fit?

## 📎 Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, or screenshots here. If this feature exists in other programming languages (e.g., Python, Pascal), feel free to mention them as a reference.
